summary: Iteration 23 - NetworkMap Feature Validation. Frontend-only testing. Successfully validated the new NetworkMap feature on the Stato Rete page. All 11 test cases passed. The map shows 8 devices in a radial layout around the 86BIT_Office center node with animated connection lines, green status indicators, SNMP/PING badges, and a legend.

issues: Minor: React warning about 'textTransform' prop on SVG element - should use lowercase 'texttransform' or remove it

network_map_feature: Toggle buttons 'Lista' and 'Mappa' visible in toolbar
Click 'Mappa' button - map view appears with SVG topology
Map shows center node with client name '86BIT_Office'
Map shows 8 device nodes arranged in a circle around center
Each device node has green status ring (all 8 devices reachable)
Each device node has SNMP or PING badge
Each device node shows device name and IP address
Map has legend in top right (Raggiungibile, Non raggiungibile, Connessione attiva)
Click 'Lista' button - list view returns with device table
Toggle between views works repeatedly without errors
All other pages still accessible (Dashboard, Alert, Connettori, Clienti)

action_items: Minor: Fix React warning - change 'textTransform' to 'texttransform' in NetworkMap.js SVG legend text element (line 334)
critical_code_review_comments: NetworkMap component correctly implements radial layout with devices around center node
SVG-based rendering with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Connection lines show animated pulses for reachable devices
Legend correctly displays all three status types
View mode toggle state properly managed in ClientStatusPage
Minor React warning: textTransform prop on SVG text element should be lowercase
context_for_next_testing_agent: NetworkMap feature validated. Map view shows 8 devices for 86BIT_Office client in radial layout. All devices reachable (green). Toggle between Lista/Mappa views works correctly. Minor React warning about textTransform prop in SVG.

map_elements.status_rings: Green (#10b981) for reachable, Red (#ef4444) for unreachable
map_elements.badges: SNMP (blue) or PING (indigo) on each device
map_elements.legend: Top right with Raggiungibile, Non raggiungibile, Connessione attiva
